## Crypto\_2.KeyStore.DEFAULT\_KEYSTORE\_ITERATIONS variable

Default PBKDF2 iterations for key store encryption. Higher than regular files since this protects the master key vault.

**Signature:**

```typescript
DEFAULT_KEYSTORE_ITERATIONS: number
```
